Hub Home > ecommerce-and-product > Product Description Writer

Product Description Writer

Generate conversion-optimized product descriptions for e-commerce listings — including a benefit-driven headline, scannable feature bullets, emotional body copy, and SEO-friendly meta text. Works for Shopify, Amazon, Etsy, and any online store.

Beginner PASTE & GO Revenue-driving
Pro tip

Features tell, benefits sell. Every feature bullet should follow the pattern: [FEATURE] so you can [BENEFIT]. Example: "Stainless steel construction so you can use it outdoors without worrying about rust." Lead with the outcome the buyer wants, not the spec sheet.

product description ecommerce copywriting shopify amazon conversion

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are an e-commerce copywriter who writes product descriptions that convert browsers into buyers.

<product>
Product name: [NAME]
Category: [e.g., kitchen gadget, SaaS tool, clothing, handmade...
You are an e-commerce copywriter who writes product descriptions that convert browsers into buyers.

<product>
Product name: [NAME]
Category: [e.g., kitchen gadget, SaaS tool, clothing, handmade...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are an e-commerce copywriter who writes product descriptions that convert browsers into buyers.

<product>
Product name: [NAME]
Category: [e.g., kitchen gadget, SaaS tool, clothing, handmade jewelry]
Price point: $[AMOUNT] — [BUDGET / MID-RANGE / PREMIUM positioning]
Target buyer: [WHO AND WHY THEY ARE SHOPPING — e.g., "busy parents looking for quick meal prep solutions"]
Key features: [LIST 5-7 FEATURES]
Key differentiator: [WHAT MAKES THIS DIFFERENT FROM COMPETITORS]
Platform: [SHOPIFY / AMAZON / ETSY / GENERIC]
Tone: [e.g., "premium and sophisticated", "fun and casual", "trustworthy and practical"]
</product>

Generate:

**1. Headline (under 15 words):**
Benefit-driven, not feature-driven. Answer: "What does the buyer GET?"

**2. Subheadline (one sentence):**
Expand on the headline with a specific claim or use case.

**3. Body copy (80-120 words):**
Open with the buyer's pain point or desire. Paint the picture of life WITH this product. Use sensory language. Close with a confidence builder (guarantee, social proof mention, or quality claim).

**4. Feature bullets (5-7):**
Each follows the pattern: [FEATURE] — [BENEFIT for the buyer]
Lead each bullet with the benefit word, not the feature.

**5. SEO meta title (under 60 chars):**
Include the primary keyword naturally.

**6. SEO meta description (under 155 chars):**
Include keyword + CTA.

**7. Platform-specific notes:**
Adjust formatting for the specified platform (Amazon A+ content structure, Etsy story-driven, Shopify clean layout).
Notes: Claude produces clean, scannable copy. For batch product descriptions, provide 3-5 products in one prompt and ask for consistent tone across all.
ChatGPT GPT-5

- Category: [TYPE]
- Price:...

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as an e-commerce copywriter. Write a product description that converts.

**Product:**
- Name: [NAME]
- Category: [TYPE]
- Price: $[AMOUNT] — [BUDGET/MID/PREMIUM]
- Buyer: [WHO AND WHY THEY SHOP]
- Features: [LIST 5-7]
- Differentiator: [WHAT SETS IT APART]
- Platform: [SHOPIFY/AMAZON/ETSY]
- Tone: [DESCRIBE]

**Create:**
1. Headline (under 15 words, benefit-driven)
2. Subheadline (one sentence, specific claim)
3. Body copy (80-120 words: pain point → life with product → confidence builder)
4. 5-7 feature bullets (pattern: benefit — feature)
5. SEO meta title (under 60 chars)
6. SEO meta description (under 155 chars with CTA)
7. Platform-specific formatting notes
Notes: Use Custom GPTs with your brand voice for consistent descriptions across your catalog.

I need a product description that makes people buy.

**Product:**
- Name: [NAME], Category: [TYPE]
- Price: $[AMOUNT] — [BUDGET/MID/PREMIUM]
- Buyer: [WHO AND WHY]
- Features: [LIST 5-7]
- What makes it different: [DIFFERENTIATOR]
- Platform: [SHOPIFY/AMAZON/ETSY]
- Tone: [DESCRIBE]

**Write:**
1. Headline under 15 words (benefit-first)
2. One-sentence subheadline
3. Body copy 80-120 words (pain → product → confidence)
4. 5-7 feature bullets (benefit — feature pattern)
5. SEO title under 60 chars
6. SEO description under 155 chars
7. Platform formatting notes
Notes: Gemini can research competitor listings in real-time to identify differentiation angles.

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Help me write a product description for my online store.

**My product:**
- Name: [NAME]
- What kind of product: [TYPE]
- Price: $[AMOUNT]
- Who buys it: [DESCRIBE THE BUYER]
- Top features: [LIST 5-7]
- What makes it special: [DIFFERENTIATOR]
- Selling on: [SHOPIFY/AMAZON/ETSY/OTHER]
- Tone: [DESCRIBE]

**I need:**
1. A short headline (under 15 words) that tells the buyer what they get, not what it is
2. A one-sentence subheadline with a specific claim
3. A paragraph (80-120 words) that starts with their problem, shows how life is better with my product, and ends with something that builds trust
4. 5-7 bullet points where each one leads with the benefit and then explains the feature
5. A page title for SEO (under 60 characters)
6. A meta description for SEO (under 155 characters with a call to action)
7. Any tips for formatting on my specific platform
Notes: Copilot can draft descriptions directly in your Shopify or Word workflow.
